---
title: "Solid Propellant Rocket Motors"
subtitle: "Emphasis on Internal Ballistics"
---

This book provides a comprehensive treatment of solid-propellant rocket motors (SRMs), with a strong focus on **internal ballistics** — the processes that govern chamber pressure, thrust, and performance as the propellant burns.

## Topics Covered

- Propellant chemistry and combustion
- Grain geometry and burnback
- Steady-state and transient internal ballistics
- Burning-rate laws (Vieille/Saint-Robert, erosive burning, dynamic burning)
- Numerical modeling and modern CFD approaches
- Real-world examples and design considerations

Render the book with:

```bash
quarto render

or preview live:
quarto preview
